content:
- Finished the runtime-restart replica stall task as stale/already-fixed.
- Verified the scenario passed three targeted reruns and again in make test-long; all required gates passed and I updated the task markdown accordingly.
- Ran task_switch, committed all .ralph/task updates in 51b78e0, pushed master successfully, and the worktree should now be clean.

- Read current task summaries and done-task summaries after startup.
- Confirmed there are no active bug tasks in current_tasks.md; existing bug items are all already completed in current_tasks_done.md.
- Need to inspect blocker tags and choose the highest-priority unblocked failing task, then write its task path into .ralph/current_task.txt and stop immediately.

- current_tasks.md only showed task headers, so I opened the underlying task files next.
- Verifying whether any later HA coverage tasks are blocked, and whether story sequencing makes task 02 the right next pick after completed task 01.
- Once blockers are confirmed, I will write exactly one task path into .ralph/current_task.txt and stop.

- Verified there are no <blocked_by> tags in the active HA or operator-reset task files, so selection is among unblocked failing tasks only.
- All high-priority failing tasks belong to the HA quorum survival story; operator ergonomics tasks are lower priority and cannot outrank them.
- Comparing the high-priority HA task descriptions now to pick the most foundational next step rather than blindly using file order.

- Chose .ralph/tasks/story-ha-quorum-survival-under-real-failures/02-task-add-whole-node-kill-and-partial-recovery-ha-e2e.md as the next task.
- Reasoning: no active unblocked bug tasks exist; high-priority failing HA tasks outrank low-priority operator-reset tasks; task 02 is the most foundational because multiple later HA tasks explicitly reuse or build on the whole-node outage semantics it introduces.
- Wrote the selected task path to .ralph/current_task.txt and should stop immediately now.

- Read the previous codex progress log and .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Current task is .ralph/tasks/story-ha-quorum-survival-under-real-failures/02-task-add-whole-node-kill-and-partial-recovery-ha-e2e.md.
- Reading the task file now to determine whether I must write the first full plan, skeptically revise an existing plan, or execute.
